title: District Judges not to be engaged in any other office and provisions relating to transfer

content.text: No District Judge shall be engaged in or deputed to any office other than that of Judge. Provided that the Government of Nepal may, in consultation with the Judicial Council, depute a District Judge to work concerning judicial inquiry, or to legal or judicial investigation or research and to any election related work, for a specified period.
The Chief Justice may, on recommendation of the Judicial Council, transfer a District Judge from one District Court to another District Court.
